body_txt: When someone (usually a guy) does something unintentionally perverted towards a girl, the latter will usually follow up with a beatdown , even if it's unwarranted . But some girls aren't like that. Instead, they are actually understanding of the situation and willing to be lenient on the person in question if they accidentally do something perverted to them. In some cases, the girl might initially attempt to take to action against supposed pervert, but they'll determine after looking at the person that he's not one. While this usually happens because the girl simply recognizes that it's an accident, it can also happen if: This trope naturally averts Double Standard and its subtrope , since the girl is actually very patient and reasonable with the guy. An Oblivious Pervert may also receive this treatment if their victim knows they are oblivious. Contrast Lovable Sex Maniac , who does act intentionally perverted but is loved all the same, and Abuse Mistake , where someone will come to believe the Accidental Pervert was doing it deliberately.
